description: Agent-safe command layer over the official 1Password CLI and SDK service-account workflows.

novel_features.name: Fuzzy-to-exact secret resolver
novel_features.description: Resolve fuzzy agent requests to exact op:// vault/item/field references without printing values.

novel_features.name: Exact-reference secret read
novel_features.description: Read only an exact op:// reference, with policy checks and an explicit --reveal gate before values are printed.

novel_features.name: Secret selection explanation
novel_features.description: Explain why a particular item and field was selected for a task without revealing the field value.

novel_features.name: Secret access preflight
novel_features.description: Check whether a planned task or command appears to require secret values, documents, cards, or write permissions.

novel_features.name: Environment reference planner
novel_features.description: Parse .env, config, or shell files for missing variables and map them to safe op:// references.

novel_features.name: Explicit environment injector
novel_features.description: Wrap op inject with a redacted plan first and require --write before producing an output file.

novel_features.name: Item category classifier
novel_features.description: Find secure notes that look like API credentials, logins, SSH keys, cards, or documents.

novel_features.name: Duplicate item detector
novel_features.description: Detect duplicate titles, URLs, usernames, and likely copied credentials across vaults without printing secret values.

novel_features.name: Item ownership audit
novel_features.description: Flag shared or service credentials missing owner, purpose, rotation, or environment tags.

novel_features.name: Credit-card metadata audit
novel_features.description: Find cards stored as notes or logins, missing owner/purpose tags, or CVV-like fields without printing card values.

novel_features.name: Card field resolver
novel_features.description: Return card item and field references without printing card numbers, expiry values, or CVVs.

novel_features.name: Document metadata inventory
novel_features.description: List document metadata and exact references without downloading document contents.

novel_features.name: Document metadata audit
novel_features.description: Flag sensitive filenames, oversized docs, private-key/cert-like documents, and documents in shared vaults.

novel_features.name: Share safety preflight
novel_features.description: Before sharing an item, show recipient, item category, included fields, expiry, and risk.

novel_features.name: Share support audit
novel_features.description: Report whether existing/shareable item link inspection is supported by op or the SDK and document unsupported status clearly.

novel_features.name: Agent policy checker
novel_features.description: Enforce rules such as never reading credit-card values, exact refs for production, and required owner tags.

novel_features.name: Service-account access scope
novel_features.description: Summarize what the current service account or op session can access by vault, category, and count without values.

novel_features.name: Service-account rate-limit status
novel_features.description: Wrap op service-account ratelimit so agents can avoid burning quota.

novel_features.name: Minimum grant planner
novel_features.description: Suggest the minimum service-account vault permissions needed for a task.

novel_features.name: op run reference planner
novel_features.description: Inspect an op run command or env files and show which secret references will resolve before executing.

novel_features.name: Stale metadata audit
novel_features.description: Flag items that appear old, untagged, duplicated, or probably unused from metadata.

novel_features.name: Misplaced item audit
novel_features.description: Find API keys, cards, documents, or SSH material saved in the wrong 1Password category.
